programme.title: Long Gone WIld
programme.desc: If you liked the documentary Blackfish, this film picks up where Blackfish left off.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep102
programme.desc: Liquid Edge leaps into canyon pools with the Deap Canyoning Team, captures a first waterfall descent with kayak superstar Steve Fisher, showcases surf cinematographer Larry Haynes, searches the world for secret surf spots via the film Planet Blow, and features an epic swell via Oakley’s Wave of the Winter.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep111: Shark Nation
programme.desc: There's no doubt sharks have an image problem. And they're certainly in trouble globally. The population of some species has declined by more than 90% due to over fishing. But there's still one place in the world where sharks thrive – the Bahamas. Sharks not only prosper there, they are highly protected. It’s illegal to kill them.

programme.title: Let's Take It Outside Ep107: Fish On…Cayman Islands International Fishing Tournament Wild Cayman Adventures (Part 1)
programme.desc: Hop-aboard as we’re fishing the Cayman Islands International Fishing Tournament hoping to win big. In this episode you’ll also enjoy Cayman Yoga and Wellness Adventures plus plenty of fresh, fine dining.

programme.title: Next Stop Ep304: Orlando, Florida - USA
programme.desc: Next Stop explores Orlando, Florida, by hanggliding at Wallaby Ranch, wrestling alligators at Gatorland, taking a Boggy Creek airboat ride, checking out The Ravenous Pig Gastropub, savoring the organic beer at Orlando Brewing, kicking back at the Lake Buena Vista Resort, and enjoying the music of Sailor 1942.

programme.title: Xplash Ep103
programme.desc: Xplash brings you eye-popping water-related action from around the globe. Today we’ll soar with the North Kiteboarding Team, slackline across the treacherous gorge at Victoria Falls, and we begin this episode with gonzo wakeboarding in Sweden.

programme.title: Surfing Lifestyle Ep105: California’s Ideal Surf Spots
programme.desc: When you get a collective of six of the world's hottest junior surfers together for a road trip down the coastal highway of California, expectations are tetering on nuclear for some high octane performance surfing.

programme.title: Blue World Ep809: Honduran Sea Turtles + Shangri-La Cave
programme.desc: Blue World heads to Roatan, in Honduras, to meet the local population of sea turtles, where he witnesses an altercation over delicious sponges and ways in which fish steal food from turtles. Then we explore an incredibly tight and dangerous cave in Florida.

programme.title: Water Ways TV Ep208: 750-Nautical Mile Run in a “Starter Boat”…Montreal to Manhattan
programme.desc: Water Ways TV's host, Steven Bull, completes the 750-nautical mile run in the “starter boat” going from Montreal to Manhattan.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep112: Deep White - Why Sharks Attack
programme.desc: Deep White explores ways to research sharks to determine why sharks attack and to study innovative ways to train sharks in order to prevent future attacks. Sharks are surprisingly intelligent and able to perform complex tasks. Sharks can distinguish different signals and cues in feeding routines and they develop strong bonds with their trainers.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Tweakin' On Boards With Ryan Burch
programme.desc: Tweakin’ on Boards was shot in 2009. Seems like a second ago and forever ago. Truth is it’s both. As a surfer and filmmaker, Burch isn’t content complaining everything's already been done. Says fellow surfer Cyrus Sutton, “He needs to FEEL history for himself.” This film is that and more.

programme.title: Atoms and Void - Lay Down Your Weapons
programme.desc: “Lay Down Your Weapons” is a respite from the cacophony of the world. Atoms and Void is musician Arlie Carstens, of Seattle’s Juno, and producer Eric Fisher. Known for his skateboarding films, Director Greg Hunt here lets landscapes and cityscapes slowly unfold. Breathe deeply, watch and listen.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 1: Don’t Lie Down
programme.desc: In 1953, W. Horace Carter won the Pulitzer Prize for his editorials opposing the KKK. This brave work lead to the FBI’s takedown of the Carolina Klans. Today, The Carters continue to champion civil rights and the environment. Grandson Wes Carter now fights for the world’s waterways. Don’t lie down.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 2: Plastic, Plastic, Everywhere
programme.desc: We join pro surfer and Journey To A New Earth advocate Koa Smith to learn about the problem of microplastics on Oahu’s North Shore. We explore efforts underway to fix the issue and spotlight a few of the ways entrepreneurs are utilizing the reclaimed materials to develop new innovative products.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 3: Walking the Walk
programme.desc: Ron Artisi has sandy toes. When taking a closer look with the crew from Sustainable Coastlines Hawaii, his world is shattered. Bob Hurley shares the tale of a young woman building an army to clean the rivers in Bali. Wes Carter explores Fishbone Carriers, the alternative to plastic 6-pack rings.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 4: No More Bubbles
programme.desc: In Episode 4 of Journey to a New Earth, Wes Carter of Atlantic Packaging talks with water photographer Clark Little, shaper Jon Pyzel, and big wave rider Kai Lenny. They join the journey, offering insights and solutions for the problematic issue of single-use plastics in the surf industry.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 5: Clean This Mess Up
programme.desc: In Episode 5, we talk with 11x World Surf League Champion, Kelly Slater, about the growing problem of plastic pollution around the world. We learn about the ways he’s chosen to make a difference with his company, Outerknown, and discuss the power of community to make real and lasting change.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 6: Jaws of Consumerism
programme.desc: Olympic Gold Medalist and 5x World Champion, Carissa Moore, shares how people and brands can eliminate single-use plastics. Juan Oliphant and Ocean Ramsey explain how shark populations are a crucial barometer for the health of our oceans. Florence Marine X talks sustainable solutions in packaging!

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 7: Decisions
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 8: Let’s Change This
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Neverland
programme.desc: Neverland is a state of mind, a mountain pushed up from the ground by imagination. Anyone can go but most people have trouble with the simple directions: Follow your dreams.

programme.title: Sparks
programme.desc: Take a pow trip around the world and into the mind of Wolle Nyvelt to find out why his passion for snowboarding runs so deep. From his legendary tenure as a rider to his work shaping pow surfers with Asmo, Wolle has dedicated his life to the culture of sliding sideways. "Sparks is the exploration into what makes snowboarding so fun and exciting to us all. It’s an interpretation of our lifestyle; the culture of building boards, riding mountains, and the adventure of choosing this path.” - Wolle Nyvelt

programme.title: Äsmosphere
programme.desc: Äsmosphere is the surf-influenced creation of Wolfgang Nyvelt showcasing his craftsmanship and appreciation for the glide and the turns we take on snow. After 16 years of filming legendary video parts, freeriding is now at the forefront of Wolle’s mind.

programme.title: Titans of Business
programme.desc: There have been many stories and documentaries on the Bill Gates’, Steve Jobs’ and Henry Fords’ of the world. What about the thousands of other business people, that had a better idea or way to make life better, cheaper, and faster? People who started out from meager beginnings or limited education, to become very wealthy! Many of these people are among us and act no differently than we do, but they have a success story to tell and tricks of success to share. These are the people profiled in “Titans of Business”.

programme.title: The Kayak Man
programme.desc: Another expedition? You must be crazy.This is what Beppe's friend told him when he decided to leave for North America. Even after paddling in the biggest rivers in the world, his desire for adventure was still not satisfied, and he went out looking for more. Dreaming of freedom, sleeping bags and nature, he ventured into the unknown to discover the Yukon and Teslin Rivers.For those unaware, the Yukon river is the major watercourse of the northwest of North America. It flows through the Canadian Yukon Territory and makes it's way to Alaska. The Teslin River is a bit shorter, but not for this reason less fun to dive into. They both offer an impressive scenery amidst cold temperatures, dangerous whitewaters and the wild nature of North America.The Kayak Man takes us on a journey of self discovery through the most beautiful landscapes of Canada and the United States while following the path of a brave kayaker that leaves his life behind in an attempt to explore new horizons by himself. An impressive trip that will not leave him the same way he was before.

programme.title: La Transat AG2R La Mondiale - Episode 1 - Depart
programme.desc: Every two years, the city of Concarneau in southern Finistère hosts the start of the Transat AG2R La Mondiale: the double-handed transatlantic on identical boats, founded over 25 years ago. This time, 15 boats line up on the quay of Carnot to make legend in this incredible competition. Let's dive into the action in France!

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 1
programme.desc: The GC32 Racing Tour is back! The World Sailing foiling catamaran circuit has returned as the world recovers from COVID, and both teams and organizers have been keen to return to racing onboard their state-of-the-art flying catamarans. After 18 months of no racing and cancelled events, the anticipation going into the first event in Lagos, Portugal is huge!After a highly competitive, spectacular 2019 season the GC32 foiling cats are back on the racecourse. In 2021, the ultra-high performance one-design catamarans will visit 3 top venues for 4 events, each location selected specially to provide conditions ideal for the nimble GC32s to fly across the water at 30+ knot speeds.So, let’s travel to Lagos, in southern Portugal's Algarve region to witness the first GC32 Racing Tour event for 2021, Lagos Cup 1.

programme.title: Nastro Rosa Tour - Review

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 2
programme.desc: In today's episode we will be visiting one of the most beautiful spots in Croatia and unknown for many. From historic sites to fabulous new modern spots, Korčula is certainly one of my favorite places in the world. With crystal clear sea this sun-drenched oasis also has plenty of water sports on offer. Get splashed into action with us!

programme.title: Temptation
programme.desc: A beautiful, young woman out on the town with friends is saved from the clutches of a serial rapist by an ancient but gorgeous vampire, but at what cost?

programme.title: The Minx
programme.desc: Linnea Chiang is a mild-mannered tobacconist by day and a masked master thief by night; like some modern day Robin Hood, the black vinyl-clad "Minx" robs large corporations and gives the money away to homeless people on the streets of Chicago.

programme.title: Exorcism in Utero
programme.desc: Herma finds a powerful ring that possesses her when she tries it on. As her body transforms and mind begins to deteriorate, she must find a way out to save herself and her unborn baby.

programme.title: False River
programme.desc: Three lunatics escape from a mental institution only to find the real world is crazier than they ever were.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E33 - Prince Edward and Sophie Rhys-Jones
programme.desc: The Real Story takes us inside a simple royal love tale. It offers a glimpse behind the scenes of how a Prince ended up falling for a girl from a regular middle-class family.

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E02 - Nature's World Wide Web
programme.desc: When animals share info to help each other decide, it's called animal communication. They use stuff like sounds, colors, body language, movements, electric signs, touches, smells, or a mix of these. Whether it's a sea anemone spreading its tentacles or a male lion considering approaching a mate, their skill in communicating can be vital for their success. This episode dives into how animals interact with one another.

programme.title: Carter's W.A.R. - S01:E10 - Africa's Most Dangerous
programme.desc: Ivan Carter investigates the most dangerous animal in Africa.

programme.title: Wild Ones - S01:E06 - Cutest
programme.desc: The charming kangaroo. The cuddly koala. The beautiful butterfly. The cheerful clownfish. Or the adorable budgie - which one is the cutest of them all?

programme.title: Wild Ones - S01:E07 - Wild Australia
programme.desc: More than 80 percent of Australia’s plants, mammals, reptiles and frogs are unique to Australia and are found nowhere else in the world. Wild dingos, frisky kangaroos, deceptively cuddly looking koalas and playful platypuses are some of the most iconic of Australia’s wild animals.

programme.title: Wild Ones - S01:E08 - Masters of the Sky
programme.desc: So many words describe the many ways that birds fly – pelicans and kestrels soar but owls fly silently. Parrots flock, vultures swarm and eagles swoop. Radar-accurate eyes scan the ground and slotted feathers adjust flight paths as hawks attack. But, which is the true master of the sky?

programme.title: Wild Ones - S01:E09 - Disguised
programme.desc: Now you see me… now you don’t. A look at the masters of disguise. From hidden lizards and invisible spiders to camouflaged cats and shimmering squids.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S06:E02 - Colorado Elk
programme.desc: Elk calls echo through the mountains where Laramy is hunting. As night falls, Laramy gets within shooting range of a huge Elk.

programme.desc: A German Mumblecore tragicomedy set in a Brandenburg mansion. Three couples, six people, love, deceit, and the question: what's next?

programme.title: You Can Change The End
programme.desc: You might not be able to change your past, but you can change what happens next. When life feels stuck or uncertain, remember this: the result belongs to God, but your response is still in your hands. You don’t have to control the outcome, just move forward and trust Him with what comes next.

programme.title: Running For A Reason
programme.desc: Our expectation of God must not be that there will never be anything chasing us in life but that we are chosen while we are chased. programme.title: All You've Got To Do Is Don't
programme.desc: We all find ourselves in seasons when we feel like we don’t have what it takes, and we don’t know what to do. But don’t be afraid or discouraged, because God isn’t late — He’s working according to His timing. Don’t lose hope, and don’t give up

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Pressured by Matilde, Carlos Raul explains that, although he intends to take care of his son, he will not give up his intention to get Adriana back.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Adriana is thrilled to see the beautiful evening that Carlos Raul has prepared for her; the couple is carried away by their feelings and consummate the deep love they have for each other.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila, in order to make Patricia live the same anguish that her mother must have felt, will offer her help and then expose her publicly. Camila has the recorded video of what happened with Celso and the condition for not handing it over to the police is that Fausto tells how his mother was incriminated.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila offers Patricia to hand over the video, only if she betrays Fausto and gives it to the police. Patricia tells Camila that her mother was not such a saint and that she was the cause of this war between the families, because of her relationship with two men at the same time. Fausto hires Anton again to kill his wife.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Fausto and Ezequiel confront each other; the video that projects Celso's death will sink Fausto unless he signs a confession where he clarifies that Rosa Blanco was unjustly condemned. Fausto manipulates saying that Ezequiel also confesses that he killed his brother Augusto, Camila's father. She arrives in time to stop Ezequiel from shooting Fausto.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Lorena and Guillermo argue in what seems to be their daily routine. In the back room of an antique shop, Claudio Corona hires a Mafioso to kill his brother Marco Aurelio so he can take possession of his goods. Lorena learns that her husband is a hitman. To recover her kidnapped son, Lorena must commit a crime.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Guillermo tells Lorena that if she does not kill Marco Aurelio Corona, she will never see her son again. Lorena returns to Lucas and informs him that she was unable to kill him. As fate would have it, Lorena and Alberto meet again. Alberto is shocked to recognize Lorena and wonders how she ended up being his father's personal nurse.

programme.title: MAGAZINE CENTRAL
programme.desc: Programa de entretenimiento que ofrece temas variados, noticias frescas y contenido alegre para mantenerte informado y motivado.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel rechazado por Camila, la manipula con una nueva oferta de trabajo como asistente de su hija Julia y todo para tratar de conseguir su cercanía. Max, confía en el amor de Camila. Torrealba pide que unan esfuerzos para encontrar a Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ante las intenciones de Ezequiel, Octavia y Marcelina agreden verbalmente a Camila. Max le propone y Camila duda pero accede a casarse con él. En una cena, Ezequiel reúne a sus hijos y Camila será la homenajeada especial.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: En la cena, el tema principal será Rosa Blanco. Ezequiel dice que esa mujer fue una oportunista que enamoró y se aprovechó de su hermano menor, Leoncio. Astrid ofende agregando que fue una prostituta, culpable de la guerra entre las dos familias por su relación con Augusto Aragón y también con Leoncio López.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila insiste en saber sobre su relación familiar, piensa que pueda ser prima de Max. Ezequiel quiere despejar la duda de que podría ser su sobrina, interroga a la Madre Isabel que niega saberlo y también recurre a Marcelina que se lo confirma. Camila, protege a Chantal, una niña que vende flores.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max y Camila en idílicos momentos sin importar ní el resultado del A.D.N. Continúan en la búsqueda de Rosa Blanco. Dos encomiendas entregadas por un mensajero, una para los López Méndez y otra para los Aragón, confirman la reaparición de El Doliente.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Al llegar a la casa de El Jagüey, Madre Isabel no los deja entrar, conocen a Henry y presumen que también pueda ser hijo de Rosa Blanco. Max piensa que algo grave

programme.title: Inquebrantable
programme.desc: Lupita vive en Ciudad Juárez con su hija Margarita, el esposo de Margarita es un alcohólico, mujeriego, y golpeador, la hija de Lupita, Margarita va a la universidad pero desde niña tiene una enfermedad de un mal cardiaco causado por la violencia domestica que ha sufrido desde niña, el doctor Villa le comenta a Lupita que Margarita su hija va a morir si no tiene un donante de corazón, desesperada ella se pone a vender cualquier cosa de valor que tenga en su casa para comprar el corazón en el mercado negro.

programme.title: Vecinos del Terror
programme.desc: Por accidente se les dispara un arma con el impacto matan al cuñado quien después regresa de ultratumba a cobrar venganza y ni la policía se escapa de la venganza de ultratumba

programme.title: Los Siete Sellos de la Santa Muerte
programme.desc: Una serie de extraños asesinatos están ocurriendo en la ciudad. Una investigadora de lo paranormal y un detective privado se dedican a indagar en el caso y lo que encontraran será algo que nunca imaginaron.

programme.title: 4 Metros
programme.desc: 4 METROS relata, en tono de comedia romántica, la historia de un hombre entrando en la crisis de los 40. Joaquín tiene un zumbido en los oídos y poco sabe de sí mismo. Se ha dejado llevar sin intervenir demasiado en sus deseos. No escucha su voz interior. Su vida afectiva y laboral no tienen rumbo. El zumbido quizá sea la expresión, no asumida ni entendida todavía, de un ruido metafórico de la vida gritándole por dónde ir. Su novia tiene 20 años menos, aparece la presión social y familiar sobre la paternidad, sentirse útil, la vocación, el trabajo y cómo ser feliz. Hasta que otra mujer irrumpe y todo parece acomodarse. Pero siempre el orden debe ser interno. Así, como si el destino tomara la palabra, su vida cambiará 4 metros abajo del agua, donde aparece un sendero para encontrar la identidad.

programme.title: Expediente 53 2.0
programme.desc: Mientras el líder de los delincuentes de la ciudad, Jack se reúne con el demonio Lilly alias Abal en un antro/table para matar y tomar las almas de sus víctimas. El FBI pide ayuda de unos sacerdotes solo que el hermano menor de Jack es poseído por Abal y ahora Jack tendrá que tomar una de las decisiones más difíciles de su vida.

programme.title: Baile Peligroso
programme.desc: Miluska es una cantante, que se gana la vida haciendo shows musicales para un hotel turístico en el sur de Perú. Durante las presentaciones conoce una variedad de empresarios de todo nivel, entre ellos está Don Mauro, un señor respetable, que admira mucho a Miluska, Carlos Reyes, un traficante de mujeres que se hace pasar por empresario. Al ser cliente frecuente del hotel se gana cierta confianza con las chicas, un día le ofrece a Miluska hacer un show para su hotel en otra provincia, pero no sabían que caerían en una trampa difícil de escapar.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.
